title: Whichever Branch
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
lore: 'On the morning of the wedding,' it murmurs, 'what if you are not the man she believes you are?'
help:
A disjunction is eliminated by carrying both of its branches to the same goal — three cases in all.
✦ Easter egg: the demon's arithmetic on Level -6 is the very proof the Algae tutorial ends on. You have met it before, in daylight.
